Clockworx
Business Orchestration Solutions

Role: Design Engineer

Skills: UX Strategy, Design System, Figma, Prototypes, Themes, HTML, Sass etc.

Website: clockworx.com

I'm excited to come back to the Clockworx project! See my previous achievements on this project

CHALLENGE

Continue evolving the platform's UX while designing new features

WHAT'S BEEN DONE

Year 2026

- Improving and fixing UI, ongoing design and development work.

- Building a Clockworx Focus Chrome Extension.

- Designing an Engineering Service iOS app.

- Creating a Claude SKILL for the styles/DS.

- Building a new marketing website for Clockworx.


Details added upon completion.

Year 2025

- We continued evolving the core navigation and sidebar experience, delivering a full redesign of the navigation structure and hamburger menu to make the system more intuitive and consistent across the platform.

- We developed and shipped a set of reusable UI components — including Comment, Attachment, Relation, and Attributes components — laying a stronger foundation for scalable interface development.

- I drove the design of AI-powered features, including multi-context AI Chat support, moving the product closer to its intelligent automation vision.

- Continued support for company marketing websites, AI webpage, homepage fixes, and production deployment and ongoing improvements for the Clockworx website.

- We tackled a wide range of UI consistency and polish tasks — from typography and button styles to checkboxes, modals, tooltips, and responsive layout fixes — significantly raising the overall quality bar of the interface.

- I contributed to improving the PDF viewer experience and for document annotation functionality.


And much more!

Clockworx Assignment Page


Year 2024

- We started implementing improvements for ongoing development tasks while also smoothly redesigning one core feature.

- We have initiated the development of AI Chat feature for the project.

- I also provided support for the company's marketing websites based on Joomla and WordPress CMSs.

- Worked on SASS Styles Library improvements etc.

- I contributed to the HobbyDB project (client of Clockworx) by enhancing UX through targeted improvements within their existing UI framework.
